name: Pizzeria Bianco (Phoenix)
teaser: The original. They make their own fresh mozzarella — probably the best pizza cheese that has ever existed.
review: The original artisan pizza from the most famous pizza chef in America that changed my life — maybe it will change yours, too? If you had the LA version it's still worth going to one of the Phoenix locations because they make their own fresh mozzarella and the result is probably the best pizza cheese that has ever existed.
headsUp: They make their own fresh mozzarella. It is the best pizza cheese on the planet.
update: The original location in Heritage Square is still the best.
address: 623 E Adams St, Phoenix, AZ 85004, USA
hours: Monday: 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM · Tuesday: 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM · Wednesday: 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM · Thursday: 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM · Friday: 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM · Saturday: 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM · Sunday: Closed
